_comment: Hand-computed from fixture-transcript.jsonl. haiku: 1M input tokens x 0.07 kWh/Mtok = 0.07 kWh (the duplicate message-id line must NOT double it). sonnet: (0.5M input + 0.5M cache-write) x 0.14 + 12.5M cache-read x 0.14 x 0.08 + 0.25M output x 2.88 = 0.14 + 0.14 + 0.72 = 1.0 kWh. opus: 0.1M x 0.27 + 0.1M x 5.76 = 0.603 kWh. Total 1.673 kWh; range = /3 .. x3; CO2e = kWh x 287 g; water on-site = kWh x 0.18 L; off-site = kWh x 2..3 L; paper = CO2e/5g and off-site water/10L.
